chapters.title: Shards of Ink
chapters.summary: In a rain‑streaked drafting room, Elisa unveils a chapter that promises to eclipse all rivals. A single glass fruit, swirling with captured sorrow, becomes the fulcrum of competition: Mara snatches it, forcing a violent confrontation that shatters the fruit and a buried memory of a burned orchard. The chapter ends with the ruined manuscript and the lingering scent of smoke, leaving Mara’s motive unresolved.
unresolved_threads: Mara’s motive for stealing the glass fruit, potentially tied to her own hidden grief or ambition.
arc_targets: Elisa’s control to surrender arc begins; she hides a secret fire that foreshadows rebellion.  Memory’s volatility is introduced via glass fruit.  Grief surfaces as a shared loss among the agents.  Ambition is shown in competitive manuscript edits.
next_arc_targets: Mara’s theft of the glass fruit leads to a desperate attempt to reclaim it.

chapters.title: Echoes in Glass
chapters.summary: In the wreckage of the shattered glass fruit, Elisa discovers a second, humming orb. Mara blackmails her with the threat of exposing a secret fire, while the shards replay the orchard blaze, forcing every agent to drown in shared grief. Elisa risks the orchard by igniting her hidden ember to melt a shard, birthing a strange glass bloom that pulses with unknown power, leaving the group haunted by a whispered title of a chapter not yet written.
unresolved_threads: The emergent glass bloom’s unknown power and its potential to alter memories or control the orchard.
Mara’s true motive for stealing the original glass fruit remains concealed.

chapters.title: Shadows in the Bloom
chapters.summary: Mara’s ultimatum casts its icy glare across the drafting room as Elisa, the reluctant heir, summons the ember that once scorched her family's orchard. Their confrontation erupts into a living pulse of sorrow—a glass bloom that cracks open, exposing a hidden fruit and a promise of a secret ending. Tension snaps taut, ambitions flare, grief swells, and a new mystery emerges, leaving the room on the edge of a revelation.
unresolved_threads: What will the hidden glass fruit inside the drawer reveal about the true ending of the book?
Mara's ultimate motive for stealing the original glass fruit remains shadowed behind her threat.

chapters.title: Veins of Ink
chapters.summary: A blackened vial of cursed ink slides into the drafting room and turns the blooming glass into a living, writhing heart. As the bloom’s pulse stabs memory, Elisa and Mara scramble for the hidden glass fruit, each seeking narrative dominion. A frozen breath of time cracks the room, and a second inscription releases a new mystery while the ink stains everything, hinting the manuscript may turn its own hand on them.

chapters.title: Ink and Blood
chapters.summary: When the blackened ink that once stained the manuscript now stains{‑}their memories, Elisa and Mara confront each other in a room that feels alive with grief, ambition, and the pulse of a living heart. A hidden glass fruit is demanded, released, and splintered by a violet flame, while the ink rewrites their memories of the orchard fire, leaving each agent uncertain of what was real and what was carved. The ink‑scribe’s ledger betrays a pact that may undo every claim, and the final shard finally falls, dissolving a word and a promise alike.
unresolved_threads: The ledger’s last entry hints at a pact that may undo the orchard fire. The implications of this pact and its harm to the agents remain uncovered.
How Lara—Mara’s lost sibling—apparent motive still needs untangling.
The full extent of the ink’s rewriting power and how it will affect Elisa’s perception of her mother’s disappearance.

chapters.title: Ink and Reckoning
chapters.summary: In the dim glow of a moonlit ledger, Elisa and Mara barter fire for memory. Shards of glass fragment, echoing grief, and the orchard burns in memory as Elisa sacrifices her own past to save it. The ledger’s last line remains unread, a promise that could undo everything.
unresolved_threads: The ledger’s final entry remains hidden, its ink pulsing with a promise that could either undo the orchard or erase the agents’ past entirely.
